name: Hardcover Metadata
description: Fetches book and author metadata -- title, overview, release date, rating, cover art, author bio, and author photo -- from Hardcover (hardcover.app) for your Jellyfin book library. Requires a free Hardcover Personal API Token.
overview: Book and author metadata from Hardcover

versions.changelog: - 1.0.0.0: Initial release. Book metadata + search, author metadata + search, cover/photo images.
